description: Triggers for AI-native product development, agency-control tradeoffs, evals, and calibration

queries.query: Help me design the agency-control tradeoff for our AI agent product
We're building an LLM-powered feature — how do we set up evals and calibration?
How much autonomy should we give our AI assistant in our product?
Design discovery and research approach for a product where AI handles user tasks
Our AI feature is hallucinating 5% of the time — build a calibration loop
What makes product management different when AI is at the core?
Set up an eval strategy for our LLM-based summarization feature
How do we test and measure quality for an AI agent that acts autonomously?
Design a trust-building roadmap for our AI-powered product
We need a framework for human-AI interaction patterns in our new product
Write a Python class for a REST API client
Help me optimize my resume for machine learning roles
How do I train a neural network from scratch?
Create a product roadmap for a traditional SaaS product
What is fine-tuning vs RAG for LLMs?
Help me write a job description for an ML engineer
Optimize my SQL query performance
Summarize this research paper about transformers
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for my Python project
Write a marketing strategy for our SaaS product
